title: Balancing Builder Bot
description: Built a two-wheeled self-balancing robot. We used LQR control and did the simulation in MATLAB. We got 4th rank internationally in the e-Yantra competition.

title: Maze Solver Bot
description: We made an autonomous maze solver bot using FPGA for the e-Yantra competition. I designed the chassis and made the PCB in KiCAD.

title: Posture Pro Belt
description: Won Best Innovation Award in MEDHA 2024. Led the making of a portable back pain relief belt. Did the CAD design and hardware integration.

title: Fastest Line Follower
description: Built a very fast line follower using STM32. I wrote the PID code and integrated the motors and sensors for fast navigation.
